controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (urban co-operative banks - asset liability management) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-operative
Banks - Asset Liability Management) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (urban co-operative banks - asset liability management) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure become effective from the date of issue
controls.control_description: These Directions shall become effective from the date of issue.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to become effective from the date of issue

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to urban co-operative banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'ucbs' and individually as a 'ucb')
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be applicable to Urban Co-operative Banks (hereinafter
collectively referred to as 'UCBs' and individually as a 'UCB').
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to urban co-operative banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'ucbs' and individually as a 'ucb')

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean primary co-operative banks as defined under section 5(ccv) read with section 56 of the banking regulation act, 1949
controls.control_description:
In this context, 'Urban Co-operative Banks' shall mean Primary Co-operative
Banks as defined under section 5(ccv) read with Section 56 of the Banking
Regulation Act, 1949.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean primary co-operative banks as defined under section 5(ccv) read with section 56 of the banking regulation act, 1949

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meaning assigned to them below: (1) 'defeasance periods' is the time taken to liquidate the position on the basis of liquidity in the seconda
controls.control_description:
In these Directions, unless the context states otherwise, the terms herein shall
bear the meaning assigned to them below:
(1) 'Defeasance periods' is the time taken to liquidate the position on the basis
of liquidity in the secondary market.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meaning assigned to them below: (1) 'defeasance periods' is the time taken to liquidate the position on the basis of liquidity in the seconda

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean:
controls.control_description: (3) 'Level I UCB', for the specific purpose of these Directions, shall mean:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean:

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act, the rbi act, rules / regulations made thereunder, or any statuto
controls.control_description:
All other expressions unless defined herein shall have the same meaning as
have been assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, the RBI Act, rules
/ regulations made thereunder, or any statutory modification or re-enactment
thereto or as used in commercial parlance, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act, the rbi act, rules / regulations made thereunder, or any statuto

controls.control_objective: To ensure be responsible for overall management of risks, as also for the formulation of risk management policy and procedures, setting prudential limits, and e
controls.control_description:
The Board shall be responsible for overall management of risks, as also for the
formulation of risk management policy and procedures, setting prudential limits,
and establishing mechanisms for audit, reporting, and review in respect of forex
risk (not applicable to a Level I UCB), liquidity risk, and interest rate risk (IRR), .
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be responsible for overall management of risks, as also for the formulation of risk management policy and procedures, setting prudential limits, and e

controls.control_objective: To ensure also oversee the implementation of the alm system, and periodically review its functioning
controls.control_description:
The Board shall also oversee the implementation of the ALM system, and
periodically review its functioning.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also oversee the implementation of the alm system, and periodically review its functioning

controls.control_objective: To ensure delegate the above responsibilities to the board of management (bom)
controls.control_description:
The Board may delegate the above responsibilities to the Board of Management
(BoM), if BoM has been constituted by a UCB as per Reserve Bank of India
(Urban Co-operative Banks - Governance) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to delegate the above responsibilities to the board of management (bom)

controls.control_objective: To ensure approve the internal prudential limits for cumulative mismatches (running total) across all time buckets of structural liquidity statement (sls) for m
controls.control_description:
The Board shall approve the internal prudential limits for cumulative mismatches
(running total) across all time buckets of Structural Liquidity Statement (SLS) for
monitoring by a UCB.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to approve the internal prudential limits for cumulative mismatches (running total) across all time buckets of structural liquidity statement (sls) for m

controls.control_objective: To ensure approve the volume, composition, holding / defeasance period, cut loss, etc
controls.control_description:
The Board shall approve the volume, composition, holding / defeasance period,
cut loss, etc., in respect of the Trading Book of a UCB.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to approve the volume, composition, holding / defeasance period, cut loss, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that various statements as provided in chapter vii are placed by the ucb before it
controls.control_description:
The Board shall ensure that various statements as provided in Chapter VII are
placed by the UCB before it.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that various statements as provided in chapter vii are placed by the ucb before it

controls.control_objective: To ensure approve prudential limits on individual gaps of interest rate sensitivity (irs) statement, which shall be based on total assets, earning assets or equ
controls.control_description:
The Board shall approve prudential limits on individual gaps of Interest Rate
Sensitivity (IRS) statement, which shall be based on Total Assets, Earning
Assets or Equity (not applicable to a Level 1 UCB).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to approve prudential limits on individual gaps of interest rate sensitivity (irs) statement, which shall be based on total assets, earning assets or equ

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the irs statement, along with the analysis of gaps and earnings at risk (ear), are placed before the board, and board / the top management
controls.control_description:
The Board shall ensure that the IRS statement, along with the analysis of Gaps
and Earnings at Risk (EaR), are placed before the Board, and Board / the Top
Management shall formulate corrective measures and devise suitable strategies
wherever needed, as per information on the IRR provided in the statement (not
applicable to a Level 1 UCB).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the irs statement, along with the analysis of gaps and earnings at risk (ear), are placed before the board, and board / the top management

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to a level 1 ucb unless stated otherwise
controls.control_description:
Guidelines in this Chapter shall not apply to a Level 1 UCB unless stated
otherwise.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to a level 1 ucb unless stated otherwise

controls.control_objective: To ensure introduce an effective asset liability management (alm) system to address liquidity risk, irr, and currency risk
controls.control_description:
A UCB shall introduce an effective Asset Liability Management (ALM) system to
address liquidity risk, IRR, and currency risk.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to introduce an effective asset liability management (alm) system to address liquidity risk, irr, and currency risk

controls.control_objective: To ensure serve as a benchmark
controls.control_description: These Directions shall serve as a benchmark.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to serve as a benchmark

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue using them
controls.control_description:
A UCB that has already
implemented more sophisticated systems may continue using them.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue using them

controls.control_objective: To ensure fine-tune its existing system to ensure compliance with the requirements set out in these directions
controls.control_description:
However,
the UCB shall fine-tune its existing system to ensure compliance with the
requirements set out in these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to fine-tune its existing system to ensure compliance with the requirements set out in these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure also review its current management information system (mis) and implement necessary enhancements as prescribed
controls.control_description:
A UCB shall also review its current
Management Information System (MIS) and implement necessary
enhancements as prescribed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also review its current management information system (mis) and implement necessary enhancements as prescribed

controls.control_objective: To ensure prepare to transition to more sophisticated techniques for irr management such as duration gap analysis, simulation, and value at risk
controls.control_description:
Once the ALM system is stabilised and the UCB
has gained sufficient experience, it shall prepare to transition to more
sophisticated techniques for IRR management such as Duration Gap Analysis,
Simulation, and Value at Risk.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to prepare to transition to more sophisticated techniques for irr management such as duration gap analysis, simulation, and value at risk

controls.control_objective: To ensure implement its alm process based on the following three pillars: (1) alm information systems, comprising:
controls.control_description:
A UCB shall implement its ALM process based on the following three pillars:
(1) ALM Information Systems, comprising:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to implement its alm process based on the following three pillars: (1) alm information systems, comprising:

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a robust information system to ensure availability of timely, adequate, and accurate information
controls.control_description:
Top Management of the UCB shall put in place a robust
information system to ensure availability of timely, adequate, and accurate
information.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place a robust information system to ensure availability of timely, adequate, and accurate information

controls.control_objective: To ensure constitute an asset liability management committee (alco), headed by the chief executive officer (ceo) or the secretary and consisting of the top mana
controls.control_description:
A UCB shall constitute an Asset Liability Management Committee (ALCO), headed
by the Chief Executive Officer (CEO) or the Secretary and consisting of the Top
Management.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to constitute an asset liability management committee (alco), headed by the chief executive officer (ceo) or the secretary and consisting of the top mana

controls.control_objective: To ensure be responsible for ensuring adherence to the policies and limits approved by the board and for deciding the business strategy, on the assets and liabi
controls.control_description:
The ALCO shall be responsible for ensuring adherence to the
policies and limits approved by the Board and for deciding the business strategy,
on the assets and liabilities sides, in alignment with the UCB's business, and risk
management objectives.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be responsible for ensuring adherence to the policies and limits approved by the board and for deciding the business strategy, on the assets and liabi

controls.control_objective: To ensure oversee the implementation of the system and periodically review its functioning
controls.control_description:
The Board shall oversee the implementation of the
system and periodically review its functioning.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to oversee the implementation of the system and periodically review its functioning

controls.control_objective: To ensure act as a decision-making unit responsible for balance sheet planning from risk-return perspective, including the strategic management of liquidity, in
controls.control_description:
The ALCO shall act as a decision-making unit responsible for balance sheet
planning from risk-return perspective, including the strategic management of
liquidity, interest rate, and forex risks.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to act as a decision-making unit responsible for balance sheet planning from risk-return perspective, including the strategic management of liquidity, in

controls.control_objective: To ensure be based on the ucb's views on current interest rates
controls.control_description:
The future business strategy decisions of
ALCO shall be based on the UCB's views on current interest rates.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be based on the ucb's views on current interest rates

controls.control_objective: To ensure determine the source and mix of liabilities or sale of assets
controls.control_description:
As part of
funding strategy, ALCO shall determine the source and mix of liabilities or sale of
assets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to determine the source and mix of liabilities or sale of assets

controls.control_objective: To ensure develop a view on future direction of interest rate movements and decide on funding mix between fixed v/s
controls.control_description:
The ALCO shall develop a view on future direction of interest rate
movements and decide on funding mix between fixed v/s.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to develop a view on future direction of interest rate movements and decide on funding mix between fixed v/s

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that all operations remain within the limits and parameters set by the board
controls.control_description:
The business and risk management strategy of a UCB shall ensure that all
operations remain within the limits and parameters set by the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that all operations remain within the limits and parameters set by the board

controls.control_objective: To ensure , inter-alia, consider key business issues such as pricing of deposits and advances, desired maturity profile, and mix of the incremental assets and l
controls.control_description:
The ALCO
shall, inter-alia, consider key business issues such as pricing of deposits and
advances, desired maturity profile, and mix of the incremental assets and liabilities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , inter-alia, consider key business issues such as pricing of deposits and advances, desired maturity profile, and mix of the incremental assets and l

controls.control_objective: To ensure review the outcome of previous decisions and evaluate the progress made in their implementation
controls.control_description:
In addition to monitoring the UCB's risk levels, the ALCO shall review the outcome
of previous decisions and evaluate the progress made in their implementation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to review the outcome of previous decisions and evaluate the progress made in their implementation

controls.control_objective: To ensure depend on the size, level of business, and organisational structure of the ucb
controls.control_description:
The composition and size (number of members) of the ALCO shall depend on the
size, level of business, and organisational structure of the UCB.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to depend on the size, level of business, and organisational structure of the ucb

controls.control_objective: To ensure head the alco, and the heads of investment, credit and strategy, treasury, risk management, etc
controls.control_description:
The CEO or the
Secretary shall head the ALCO, and the Heads of Investment, Credit and Strategy,
Treasury, Risk Management, etc., can be its members, along with other members
as deemed suitable.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to head the alco, and the heads of investment, credit and strategy, treasury, risk management, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be an invitee
controls.control_description:
The Head of the Information Technology Division shall be an
invitee.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be an invitee

controls.control_objective: To ensure have sub-committees and support groups
controls.control_description: A UCB, at its discretion, may have Sub-committees and Support Groups.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have sub-committees and support groups

controls.control_objective: To ensure decide the frequency for holding meetings of the alco
controls.control_description: A UCB shall decide the frequency for holding meetings of the ALCO.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to decide the frequency for holding meetings of the alco

controls.control_objective: To ensure be responsible for analysing, monitoring, and reporting the risk profiles to the alco
controls.control_description:
The ALM Support Groups, consisting of operating staff, shall be responsible for
analysing, monitoring, and reporting the risk profiles to the ALCO.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be responsible for analysing, monitoring, and reporting the risk profiles to the alco

controls.control_objective: To ensure also prepare forecasts (simulations) showing the effects of various possible changes in market conditions related to the balance sheet and recommend t
controls.control_description:
The Group shall
also prepare forecasts (simulations) showing the effects of various possible
changes in market conditions related to the balance sheet and recommend the
action needed to adhere to UCB's internal limits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also prepare forecasts (simulations) showing the effects of various possible changes in market conditions related to the balance sheet and recommend t

controls.control_objective: To ensure include the following: (1) liquidity risk management
controls.control_description:
The scope of ALM function shall include the following:
(1) Liquidity risk management.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include the following: (1) liquidity risk management

controls.control_objective: To ensure measure liquidity positions on an ongoing basis as also examine how liquidity requirements are likely to evolve under different assumptions / scenario
controls.control_description:
A UCB shall measure liquidity positions on an ongoing basis as also examine how
liquidity requirements are likely to evolve under different assumptions / scenarios.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to measure liquidity positions on an ongoing basis as also examine how liquidity requirements are likely to evolve under different assumptions / scenario

controls.control_objective: To ensure be undertaken through: (1) stock approach: analysing liquidity ratios such as credit deposit ratio, loans to total assets, loans to core deposits, and
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be undertaken through: (1) stock approach: analysing liquidity ratios such as credit deposit ratio, loans to total assets, loans to core deposits, and

controls.control_objective: To ensure prepare the sls under static scenario without reckoning the future business growth, as per the reporting format provided in annex-i and annex-ii of th
controls.control_description:
A Scheduled UCB and a non-Scheduled UCB shall prepare the SLS under static
scenario without reckoning the future business growth, as per the reporting format
provided in Annex-I and Annex-II of these Directions, respectively.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to prepare the sls under static scenario without reckoning the future business growth, as per the reporting format provided in annex-i and annex-ii of th

controls.control_objective: To ensure use the maturity profile, given in annex-vi (for a scheduled ucb) and
controls.control_description: A UCB shall use the maturity profile, given in Annex-VI (for a Scheduled UCB) and
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to use the maturity profile, given in annex-vi (for a scheduled ucb) and

controls.control_objective: To ensure classify all cash inflows and outflows in the maturity ladder according to the expected timing of cash flows
controls.control_description:
A UCB shall classify all cash inflows and outflows in the maturity ladder according
to the expected timing of cash flows.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to classify all cash inflows and outflows in the maturity ladder according to the expected timing of cash flows

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a cash outflow while a maturing asset shall be a cash inflow
controls.control_description:
A maturing liability shall be a cash outflow
while a maturing asset shall be a cash inflow.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a cash outflow while a maturing asset shall be a cash inflow

controls.control_objective: To ensure make assumptions according to its asset liability profile
controls.control_description:
While determining the probable cash
<image>
inflows / outflows, a UCB shall make assumptions according to its asset liability
profile.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make assumptions according to its asset liability profile

controls.control_objective: To ensure monitor its cumulative mismatches (running total) across all time buckets by establishing internal prudential limits with the approval of the board
controls.control_description:
A UCB shall monitor its cumulative mismatches (running total) across all time
buckets by establishing internal prudential limits with the approval of the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to monitor its cumulative mismatches (running total) across all time buckets by establishing internal prudential limits with the approval of the board

controls.control_objective: To ensure be fixed, taking into account the asset- liability profile, nature of business, and future strategy
controls.control_description:
Tolerance levels for mismatches shall be fixed, taking into account the asset-
liability profile, nature of business, and future strategy.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be fixed, taking into account the asset- liability profile, nature of business, and future strategy

controls.control_objective: To ensure be on short term mismatches
controls.control_description:
While the mismatches upto
one year would be relevant since these provide early warning signals of impending
liquidity problems, the main focus should be on short term mismatches.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be on short term mismatches

controls.control_objective: To ensure , under normal circumstances, not exceed 20 per cent of the cash outflows in the respective time bucket
controls.control_description:
For a non-Scheduled UCB (including Level I UCB), the negative mismatches
(negative gap) in the 1-14 days, and 15-28 days time buckets shall, under normal
circumstances, not exceed 20 per cent of the cash outflows in the respective time
bucket.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , under normal circumstances, not exceed 20 per cent of the cash outflows in the respective time bucket

controls.control_objective: To ensure adopt a more granular approach to measurement of liquidity risk by splitting the first time bucket (1-14 days) in the sls into three time buckets, viz
controls.control_description:
A Scheduled UCB shall adopt a more granular approach to measurement of
liquidity risk by splitting the first time bucket (1-14 days) in the SLS into three time
buckets, viz., next day, 2-7 days, and 8-14 days.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adopt a more granular approach to measurement of liquidity risk by splitting the first time bucket (1-14 days) in the sls into three time buckets, viz

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed 5 per cent, 10 per cent, 15 per cent and 20 per cent of the cumulative cash outflows in the respective time buckets
controls.control_description:
A Scheduled UCB shall ensure
that the net cumulative negative mismatches during the next day, 2-7 days, 8-14
days, and 15-28 days buckets shall not exceed 5 per cent, 10 per cent, 15 per cent
and 20 per cent of the cumulative cash outflows in the respective time buckets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed 5 per cent, 10 per cent, 15 per cent and 20 per cent of the cumulative cash outflows in the respective time buckets

controls.control_objective: To ensure be placed under the residual maturity buckets, corresponding to their remaining maturities
controls.control_description:
Investments in SLR securities and other investments shall be placed under the
residual maturity buckets, corresponding to their remaining maturities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be placed under the residual maturity buckets, corresponding to their remaining maturities

controls.control_objective: To ensure classify such securities under 1-14 days (split into next day, 2-7 days, and 8-14 days in case of a scheduled ucb), 15-28 days, and 29-90 days' time buckets, based on their defeasance periods
controls.control_description:
A UCB maintaining securities in the Trading Book, kept distinct from other
investments made for complying with the Statutory Reserve requirements and for
retaining customer relationship, shall classify such securities under 1-14 days (split
into next day, 2-7 days, and 8-14 days in case of a Scheduled UCB), 15-28 days,
and 29-90 days' time buckets, based on their defeasance periods, provided the
trading book meets the following criteria:
(1) Clearly defined composition and volume;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to classify such securities under 1-14 days (split into next day, 2-7 days, and 8-14 days in case of a scheduled ucb), 15-28 days, and 29-90 days' time buckets, based on their defeasance periods

controls.control_objective: To ensure approve the volume, composition, holding / defeasance period, cut loss, etc
controls.control_description:
The ALCO of the UCB (Board in case of a Level I UCB) shall approve the volume,
composition, holding / defeasance period, cut loss, etc., of the Trading Book.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to approve the volume, composition, holding / defeasance period, cut loss, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure take into account the ₹ inflows and outflows on account of its forex operations while preparing the prescribed liquidity statements
controls.control_description:
A UCB with Authorised Dealer (AD) licence shall take into account the ₹ inflows
and outflows on account of its forex operations while preparing the prescribed
liquidity statements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take into account the ₹ inflows and outflows on account of its forex operations while preparing the prescribed liquidity statements

controls.control_objective: To ensure classify them in the appropriate time buckets
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding guidance provided in Annex-VI and Annex-VII of these Directions,
a UCB which is better equipped to reasonably estimate the behavioural pattern of
various components of assets and liabilities on the basis of past data / empirical
studies shall classify them in the appropriate time buckets, subject to approval from
the ALCO.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to classify them in the appropriate time buckets

controls.control_objective: To ensure estimate its short-term liquidity profile on the basis of business projections and other commitments for planning purposes, as per indicative format f
controls.control_description:
A UCB shall estimate its short-term liquidity profile on the basis of business
projections and other commitments for planning purposes, as per indicative format
for Short-term Dynamic Liquidity statement in Annex-III.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to estimate its short-term liquidity profile on the basis of business projections and other commitments for planning purposes, as per indicative format f

controls.control_objective: To ensure be prepared by the reserve bank of india
controls.control_description:
The list of such Scheduled UCBs which meet the eligibility norms to participate in
LAF and MSF (Positive List), and of those Scheduled UCBs found ineligible
(Negative List), shall be prepared by the Reserve Bank of India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be prepared by the reserve bank of india

controls.control_objective: To ensure set gap limits and adopt value at risk (var) approach to measure the risk associated with forex exposures
controls.control_description:
A UCB with AD license shall set Gap limits and adopt Value at Risk (VaR) approach
to measure the risk associated with forex exposures.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to set gap limits and adopt value at risk (var) approach to measure the risk associated with forex exposures

controls.control_objective: To ensure form part of the risk management approach for the ucb's forex operations
controls.control_description:
The open position limits
together with the Gap limits shall form part of the risk management approach for
the UCB's forex operations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to form part of the risk management approach for the ucb's forex operations

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to a level i ucb
controls.control_description:
The provision of this Chapter shall not apply to a Level I UCB, unless stated
otherwise.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to a level i ucb

controls.control_objective: To ensure implement appropriate systems to measure and manage irr, arising on account of deregulation of interest rates, and operational flexibility in pricing
controls.control_description:
A UCB shall implement appropriate systems to measure and manage IRR, arising
on account of deregulation of interest rates, and operational flexibility in pricing of
assets and liabilities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to implement appropriate systems to measure and manage irr, arising on account of deregulation of interest rates, and operational flexibility in pricing

controls.control_objective: To ensure employ suitable analytical tools for the measurement and management of irr
controls.control_description:
A UCB shall employ suitable analytical tools for the measurement and
management of IRR.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to employ suitable analytical tools for the measurement and management of irr

controls.control_objective: To ensure initially use the traditional gap analysis (tga) for measuring irr
controls.control_description:
The UCB shall initially use the Traditional Gap Analysis (TGA)
for measuring IRR.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to initially use the traditional gap analysis (tga) for measuring irr

controls.control_objective: To ensure measure gap or mismatch risk by calculating gaps, i
controls.control_description:
Under TGA, a UCB shall measure Gap or Mismatch risk by calculating Gaps, i.e.,
the difference between Rate Sensitive Assets (RSA) and Rate Sensitive Liabilities
(RSL) over different time intervals as on a given date.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to measure gap or mismatch risk by calculating gaps, i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be generated by grouping rate sensitive liabilities, assets, and off-balance sheet positions into time buckets according to residual maturity or next
controls.control_description:
A Gap Report shall be generated by grouping
rate sensitive liabilities, assets, and off-balance sheet positions into time buckets
according to residual maturity or next repricing period, whichever is earlier.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be generated by grouping rate sensitive liabilities, assets, and off-balance sheet positions into time buckets according to residual maturity or next

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as interest rate sensitive
controls.control_description:
All investments, advances, deposits, borrowings, and other instruments that
mature / have a cash flow or reprice within a specific time frame shall be treated
as interest rate sensitive.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as interest rate sensitive

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be treated as rate sensitive if they are expected to be received within the time horizon
controls.control_description:
Repayments of loan instalments, including both principal and periodic payments,
shall also be treated as rate sensitive if they are expected to be received within the
time horizon.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be treated as rate sensitive if they are expected to be received within the time horizon

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as rate sensitive at the time of contractual repricing
controls.control_description:
Assets and liabilities that are linked to a reference rate that reprices at pre-
determined intervals, shall be treated as rate sensitive at the time of contractual
repricing.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as rate sensitive at the time of contractual repricing

controls.control_objective: To ensure prepare the irs statement, as per the reporting format provided in
controls.control_description: A UCB shall prepare the IRS statement, as per the reporting format provided in
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to prepare the irs statement, as per the reporting format provided in

controls.control_objective: To ensure report only ₹ assets, liabilities, and off-balance sheet positions in the irs statement
controls.control_description:
A UCB shall report only ₹ assets, liabilities, and off-balance sheet positions in the
IRS statement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report only ₹ assets, liabilities, and off-balance sheet positions in the irs statement

controls.control_objective: To ensure be grouped into the following time buckets according to residual maturity or next repricing date, whichever is earlier: (1) upto 3 months (2) over 3 m
controls.control_description:
The rate sensitive assets, liabilities, and off-balance sheet positions shall be
grouped into the following time buckets according to residual maturity or next
repricing date, whichever is earlier:
(1) Upto 3 months
(2) Over 3 months and upto 6 months
(3) Over 6 months and upto 1 year
(4) Over 1 year and upto 3 years
(5) Over 3 years and upto 5 years
(6) Over 5 years
(7) Non-sensitive
58.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be grouped into the following time buckets according to residual maturity or next repricing date, whichever is earlier: (1) upto 3 months (2) over 3 m

controls.control_objective: To ensure be classified into time buckets as per guidance given in annex-viii (scheduled ucb) and annex-ix (non-scheduled ucb)
controls.control_description:
The various items of rate sensitive assets and liabilities, and off-balance sheet
items shall be classified into time buckets as per guidance given in Annex-VIII
(Scheduled UCB) and Annex-IX (non-Scheduled UCB).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be classified into time buckets as per guidance given in annex-viii (scheduled ucb) and annex-ix (non-scheduled ucb)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be used by the ucb to assess the extent of irr and to formulate irr mitigation strategies
controls.control_description:
Gap Reports shall be used by the UCB to assess the extent of IRR
and to formulate IRR mitigation strategies.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be used by the ucb to assess the extent of irr and to formulate irr mitigation strategies

controls.control_description:
A UCB shall set prudential limits on individual Gaps with the approval of its Board,
which shall be based on Total Assets, Earning Assets or Equity levels of the UCB.

controls.control_objective: To ensure also work out earnings at risk (ear) in terms of last year's nii, or net interest margin (nim) aligned with its views on interest rate movements
controls.control_description:
<image>
A UCB shall also work out Earnings at Risk (EaR) in terms of last year's NII, or Net
Interest Margin (NIM) aligned with its views on interest rate movements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also work out earnings at risk (ear) in terms of last year's nii, or net interest margin (nim) aligned with its views on interest rate movements

controls.control_description:
The IRS statement, along with the analysis of Gaps and EaR, shall be placed
before the Board in its next meeting.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be placed before the board in its next meeting

controls.control_objective: To ensure formulate corrective measures and devise suitable strategies wherever needed, as per information on irr provided in the statement
controls.control_description:
The Top Management / Board shall formulate
corrective measures and devise suitable strategies wherever needed, as per
information on IRR provided in the statement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to formulate corrective measures and devise suitable strategies wherever needed, as per information on irr provided in the statement

controls.control_objective: To ensure classify them in the appropriate time buckets based on the behavioural patterns
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding the guidance provided in Annex-VIII and Annex-IX of these
Directions, a UCB which is better equipped to reasonably estimate the behavioural
pattern of various components of assets and liabilities on the basis of past data /
empirical studies shall classify them in the appropriate time buckets based on the
behavioural patterns, subject to approval from the ALCO.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to classify them in the appropriate time buckets based on the behavioural patterns

controls.control_objective: To ensure refer to the reserve bank of india (filing of supervisory returns) directions - 2024 dated february 27, 2024, for instructions with respect to periodi
controls.control_description:
A UCB shall refer to the Reserve Bank of India (Filing of Supervisory Returns)
Directions - 2024 dated February 27, 2024, for instructions with respect to
periodicity and timelines of returns consolidated as under:
B.1 Scheduled UCB:
Return Periodicity
Structural Liquidity Statement (ALM3) Fortnightly
Short-term Dynamic Liquidity statement (ALM2) Fortnightly
Interest Rate Sensitivity Statement (ALM1) Monthly
B.2 Non-Scheduled UCB (excluding UCB in Level I):
Return Periodicity
Structural Liquidity Statement (ALM3) Quarterly
Interest Rate Sensitivity Statement (ALM1) Quarterly
B.3 UCB in Level I:
Return Periodicity
Structural Liquidity Statement (ALM3) Quarterly
64.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to refer to the reserve bank of india (filing of supervisory returns) directions - 2024 dated february 27, 2024, for instructions with respect to periodi

The

repealed.

Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken, or
initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to
be governed by the provisions thereof.

controls.control_description:

under these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these Directions.

and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted,

For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to
remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in
<image>
respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any provision of
these Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding
